description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.4.4 Docker image with a postgres:latest service and caches the vendor/ruby directory. Define variables POSTGRES_DB=team-d_development and DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@postgres:5432/$POSTGRES_DB. Add a build‑stage job named "proses compile" that runs on all branches except master and executes: apt-get update && apt install -y -qq nodejs, gem install bundler --no-ri --no-rdoc, gem install execjs, RAILS_ENV=test bundle install --jobs $(nproc) "${FLAGS[@]}", bundle exec rails db:migrate, and bundle exec rails db:seed. Add a deploy‑stage job named "proses deploy production" that runs only on master, sets the environment to production, runs gem install dpl, and deploys to Heroku with dpl --provider=heroku --app=airdo-web --api-key=24911925-128a-4ff9-9f30-dbf280b10199.
